---
title: "Acknowledgements"
---

FP Complete is the corporate sponsor of this tooling. Thanks FP Complete and
thanks to my colleagues; Daniel Herrera Rendón for first seeing this could work,
Neil Mayhew for makefile tips and tricks, Abel Sen for careful reviews and
thoughtful suggestions and Eduardo Lemos Rocha for advocacy and enthusiasm.

I already knew Dhall well from maintaining hpack-dhall. Thanks Simon Hengel for
suggesting I take over its maintenance.

Please contact me for any questions, problems, suggestions or the like.
Maintenance of Updo will be coming from me and not FP Complete.
